name: Testing diagnostics
description: Classify test failures and guide fixes for implementation, tests, or environment.
when_to_use: When the node runs tests, fixes failing tests, or configures test layout.

testing.python.description: Python pytest layout, imports, fixtures, and isolation.
prompt_fragments: Prefer pytest with tests/ and src/ layout; add conftest.py for sys.path when needed.
Use tmp_path/fixtures for state isolation; do not leak module-level globals between tests.
For import/collection errors, fix PYTHONPATH/conftest before changing business logic.
Use JUnit 5; configure Maven Surefire or Gradle test task.
For Spring, prefer @SpringBootTest with test profile and application-test.properties.
Use @Transactional or test containers for DB isolation when applicable.

testing.general.description: Oracle design, assertions, command policy, and failure taxonomy.
prompt_fragments: Classify failures: import/collection, assertion, state leakage, command policy rejected.
Do not weaken assertions or delete test bodies to force green builds.
Run only allowlisted test commands; request access before new commands.
